---
title: "Publications"
description: "A publication index prepared for verified OptoLAB bibliographic records."
canonical-url: "https://optolab-unimore.github.io/publications.html"
bibliography: publications.bib
---

This page is ready for a verified BibTeX bibliography. No publications are listed yet because authorship, affiliations and bibliographic records must be reviewed before release.

## Add a publication

Add a valid record to `publications.bib`, then cite it from this page with its BibTeX key. The repository [README](https://github.com/OPTOLAB-UNIMORE/optolab-unimore.github.io#adding-a-publication) documents the workflow.

::: {.callout-important}
Do not publish placeholder citations or infer laboratory authorship from repository metadata.
:::
